response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying to an entry-level Junior role — a strong seniority mismatch that creates high attrition risk and salary expectation gaps. German is listed as only 'Basic' while the role explicitly requires strong verbal and written German for client-facing insurance work in Germany. Java is listed as a skill but the work history shows primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no insurance-sector or substantial Java project experience.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded and cloud
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Demonstrated teaching/community work (workshops, talks, courses) suggesting collaboration skills
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level position — likely flight risk and salary mismatch
Only 'Basic' German, but role requires strong German for insurance client work
Java is a peripheral skill; primary stacks are TS/Node and DLang, and currently based in São Paulo

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and craftsmanship background
